## What should Private Council do?

Describe the feature.

## Why does it matter?

Explain the decision-making problem this solves.

## Which part of the system does it affect?

- Protocol
- Role behavior
- Decision Canvas
- Cross-validation
- Evaluation
- Memory
- Retrospective
- UI
- Model provider
- Other:

## Any implementation ideas?

Optional.
